name: Lucemon

signature_move.name: Grand Cross
signature_move.description: Fires ten superheated orbs in a cruciform syzygy.

description: Said to have descended to the ancient Digital World long ago, it is an Angel Digimon which has the appearance of a child. It manifested in an era in which the Digital World was still chaotic, and it is said that it brought about order and harmony. However, a long period of darkness was summoned due to Lucemon's later "Rebellion". Although it has the appearance of a child, the power and intelligence it possesses surpass even that of a Perfect Digimon. It is said that Lucemon's abilities have now been inherited and split among the Three Archangels . Its Special Move is firing ten super-heated spheres of light arranged in a cruciform syzygy ( Grand Cross ). This technique possesses a power surpassing that of Seraphimon 's " Seven Heavens ".
